name: Admin Flow - Verify admin configurations and permissions management

planSteps.description: Navigate to the home page or login page.
Login as an admin user using email 'fares@gmail.com'. If the password is not known, sign up a new admin user or try common test passwords like '1234' or '123456'.
User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
Navigate to the configuration page or open the settings modal where Roles and Permissions are managed.
The admin should be able to see the list of options, roles, and be able to grant or revoke permissions.
